response:
Brittany needs to calculate her total shampoo usage for a leap year, which has [number] days, by dividing the total ounces required by the bottle size. Since she washes her hair every other day, she will use the product on [count] occasions throughout the year.

To find the number of bottles, divide the total ounces needed by the 14-ounce capacity of each bottle and round up to ensure she has enough. This calculation determines the final quantity of bottles she must purchase to last the entire period.
